title: Root Upgrade Front Door
goal: Implement #479 so host-repo update guidance has one ordinary front door: agentic-workspace upgrade --target <repo> --dry-run, then apply, then doctor.
non_goals: Do not implement the full #478 lifecycle matrix in this slice.
Do not generate mutating lifecycle adapters.

intent.outcome: Host-repo docs, command output, and tests point agents to root agentic-workspace upgrade first while preserving module-specific commands as fallback/debug surfaces.
intent.constraints: Keep lifecycle management repo-/tool-/language-agnostic and preserve module debugging entrypoints.
intent.latitude: Adjust docs, CLI output, contracts, and targeted tests as needed.
intent.escalation: Escalate if making root upgrade authoritative requires deleting module package CLIs or broad lifecycle redesign.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, commit, push, close #479, refresh external evidence, then promote the next lifecycle child issue.
execution.proof: workspace CLI lifecycle tests, docs/output assertions, proof selector, planning closeout

invariants: Root upgrade is the ordinary host-repo update path.
Dry-run is the first safe step.
Module-specific upgrade commands remain reachable for package-local debugging/fallback.
Output names selected modules, planned changes or manual-review items, and next safe command.

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #479 closeout, promote the next lifecycle child issue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Host-repo lifecycle guidance can converge on root upgrade before deeper fixture/refusal cleanup.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #480 stale helper instructions, #481 fixture matrix, #482 plan action classification, #483 destructive lifecycle refusal coverage, and #484 legacy machinery removal.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Dogfooding root upgrade dry-run showed installed managed docs must be changed with the package payload source or upgrade will fight local edits; this slice fixed that for the lifecycle contract and #480 already covers remaining stale upgrade-guidance drift.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: #480 stale upgrade instructions unless reingestion reprioritizes.

context_budget.live working set: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml, this execplan, #479/#478 issue bodies, lifecycle docs, root upgrade implementation/tests
context_budget.recoverable later: full external issue evidence, historical review/closeout archives, package-local bootstrap internals outside touched lifecycle docs
context_budget.externalize before shift: update execution_run, validation_commands, proof_report, intent_satisfaction, and closure_check
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Active issue is #479 root upgrade front door.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before changing module package CLIs, deleting legacy lifecycle branches, or expanding into fixture matrix work.
context_budget.deep_context_loaded: Lifecycle docs, root upgrade CLI implementation/tests, package lifecycle payload doc, proof/closeout outputs.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make root upgrade the single authoritative host-repo update path.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces; commit/push milestone; close issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wording and output field names for root-front-door guidance.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The change would remove package-specific CLIs or expand into the whole lifecycle fixture matrix.

active_milestone.scope: docs, root upgrade output, tests, and planning state

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #479, refresh evidence, and promote the next lifecycle child issue.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <changed paths> --format json
uv run ruff check src tests

validation_commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "upgrade_lifecycle_plan_advertises_root_front_door or upgrade_json_collects_summary_categories"
Set-Location packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
uv run ruff check src tests
Set-Location packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/docs/agent-installation.md .agentic-workspace/docs/lifecycle-and-config-contract.md packages/planning/bootstrap/.agentic-workspace/docs/lifecycle-and-config-contract.md src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/root-upgrade-front-door.plan.json --format json
validation_commands.result: pass: selected workspace_cli, planning_package, cli_authority, planning_surfaces

validation_commands.command: uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

validation_commands.result: pass: lifecycle_plan includes root_upgrade_front_door and lifecycle-and-config-contract.md is current against package payload

validation_commands.command: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
validation_commands.result: pass: surfaced need to record workflow evidence and preserve #478 continuation

completion_criteria: Host-repo docs point to root agentic-workspace upgrade as the first update path.
Root upgrade dry-run output is clearly safe and informative.
Package-specific upgrade commands are documented as fallback/debugging surfaces.
Tests cover root upgrade command routing for memory-only, planning-only, and full selections.

execution_run.handoff source: GitHub issue #479 plus refreshed external-intent evidence
execution_run.what happened: Added root-upgrade-front-door guidance to upgrade lifecycle plans, updated host-repo lifecycle docs to prefer root upgrade dry-run/apply/doctor, aligned the planning package payload lifecycle contract, and added module-selection tests for memory-only, planning-only, and full upgrade routing.
execution_run.scope touched: Root workspace CLI lifecycle plan rendering, root workspace CLI tests, installed lifecycle docs, planning package payload lifecycle docs, and planning state.
execution_run.validations run: focused and full workspace CLI tests, planning package installer/check tests, ruff, planning surface checks, maintainer-surfaces, proof selector, root CLI authority, doctor, upgrade dry-run, preflight, summary, workflow_obligations, closeout_trust, reconcile.
execution_run.result for continuation: #479 satisfied; #478 remains open with #480-#484 as required continuation.
execution_run.next step: Archive, commit, push, close #479, refresh evidence, and promote #480 unless reingestion reprioritizes.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: focused and full workspace CLI tests, planning package installer/check tests, ruff, planning surface checks, maintainer-surfaces, proof selector, root CLI authority, doctor, upgrade dry-run, preflight, summary, workflow_obligations, closeout_trust, reconcile.

finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; package-specific CLIs remain available but are framed as fallback/debug surfaces.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Make root upgrade the single authoritative host-repo update path.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane lifecycle-management-hardening activates a fresh bounded slice.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Made root agentic-workspace upgrade the authoritative host-repo update front door for #479.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archived plan plus docs/tests; no Memory promotion needed.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Docs and tests now encode root-upgrade-first guidance; no Memory promotion.

signals.summary: Root upgrade dry-run exposed managed-doc source/payload drift when installed docs changed without payload docs.
signals.routed_to: #480 covers stale upgrade guidance and checks for drift against default installs.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.
